query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bridge_academy_student_difficulty_profiles (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  topicId INT NOT NULL,
  courseId INT NOT NULL,
  currentDifficulty ENUM('easy', 'medium', 'hard') DEFAULT 'easy' NOT NULL,
  averageScore INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  attemptCount INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  bestScore INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  improvementTrend INT DEFAULT 0,
  lastAttemptAt TIMESTAMP,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
